decisions.decision: Team content: Migrate entirely to Markdown with YAML frontmatter in src/content/team/
Research content: Migrate 5 themes to Markdown in src/content/research/
Publications: Stay in src/data/publications.json (add id fields)
decisions.rationale: Already optimal tabular format. No migration needed.

decisions.decision: Cross-linking: Add explicit publicationIds array in research frontmatter, matched against new id field in publications.json
decisions.rationale: Most robust linking mechanism. DOI lookup by slug.

decisions.decision: Team photos: Use representative stock/AI portraits per member
decisions.rationale: Replaces SVG placeholders with realistic visuals.

decisions.decision: Publication filters: Keep existing granular tag taxonomy

next_action: Write 02-DISCUSSION-LOG.md documenting the 4 discussed gray areas and their resolutions, then commit context files together.
context_notes: Phase 2 context discussion is complete. All 4 gray areas resolved: content migration (full Markdown for team+research, JSON stays for publications), cross-linking (slug IDs), photos (stock/AI), filters (keep current tags). Next is creating the plan and executing.
